mapper.select: SELECT id, site_title_zh, site_title_ja, site_title_en, site_subtitle_zh, site_subtitle_ja, site_subtitle_en, about_md_zh, about_md_ja, about_md_en, logo_url, favicon_url, icp_no, spotify_playlist_id, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by FROM t_site_config WHERE id = 1 AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, site_title_zh, site_title_ja, site_title_en, site_subtitle_zh, site_subtitle_ja, site_subtitle_en, about_md_zh, about_md_ja, about_md_en, logo_url, favicon_url, icp_no, spotify_playlist_id, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by FROM t_site_config WHERE id = 1 AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_site_config SET site_title_zh = #{config.siteTitleZh}, site_title_ja = #{config.siteTitleJa}, site_title_en = #{config.siteTitleEn}, site_subtitle_zh = #{config.siteSubtitleZh}, site_subtitle_ja = #{config.siteSubtitleJa}, site_subtitle_en = #{config.siteSubtitleEn}, about_md_zh = #{config.aboutMdZh}, about_md_ja = #{config.aboutMdJa}, about_md_en = #{config.aboutMdEn}, logo_url = #{config.logoUrl}, favicon_url = #{config.faviconUrl}, icp_no = #{config.icpNo}, spotify_playlist_id = #{config.spotifyPlaylistId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = 1 AND deleted = 0
